description_long: This stool features a striking geometric design with sharply angled legs that extend outward from the seat, creating a bold and modern silhouette. The seat itself is flat and rectangular, seamlessly integrated into the overall angular frame. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, providing ergonomic support while maintaining the minimalist aesthetic. The entire structure appears to be constructed from a single material, likely wood or a wood composite, finished in a uniform brown color. The stool lacks any visible decorative elements, footrests, or additional components, emphasizing its clean lines and functional form. Its robust build suggests it is suitable for public spaces such as parks, plazas, or urban waiting areas.
description: A modern, angular brown stool with a tall backrest and outward-slanting legs, crafted from a single material and featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat seat and tall, slightly reclined backrest with sharply angled legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dramatic backward slant of the backrest and the triangular profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full height and width of the backrest, with the legs converging toward the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the angular structure and shows the solid, blocky seat and backrest connection.
